assets.label: Office Tower
assets.description: Tall Manhattan-style office slab with a retail podium and lit crown.

assets.label: Mixed-Use Midrise
assets.description: Brick-and-stone midrise with storefronts, repetitive bays, and rooftop utility bulk.

assets.label: Apartment Midrise
assets.description: Residential slab with balcony bands, inset lobby, and a calmer facade rhythm.

assets.label: Shop Row
assets.description: Attached storefront sequence with signage strips, awnings, and upper rental floors.

assets.label: Warehouse
assets.description: Low industrial shed with loading docks, rooftop kit, and yard barriers.

assets.label: Townhouse Row
assets.description: Attached townhouse frontage with stoops, cornices, and narrow rhythm.

assets.label: Transit Station
assets.description: Surface station entrance composition with railings, stairs, kiosks, and signage.

assets.label: Civic Hall
assets.description: Public building mass with stepped forecourt, civic doorway, and lantern roofline.
